title: Cost of Debt: The Altman Z-score is used to predict the likelihood of...
summary: Assess the Altman Z-score as a multi-ratio measure for predicting bankruptcy.
prompt: The Altman Z-score is used to predict the likelihood of bankruptcy for a firm.
solution: The Altman Z-score combines various financial ratios to assess a firm's likelihood of bankruptcy. It considers factors such as working capital, retained earnings, EBIT, total equity, and total liabilities to provide a score that indicates financial health.
